summary: Disconnect leaves hero stuck on remote card; Settings shows stopped but footer frozen on Pod GPU ~15-70s.
Root: slow connected feed tick awaiting /remote/pod/specs re-emits stale Pod card AFTER the disconnect finally paints local; miss-debounce then delays recovery.

CODED (js/shell.js): (1) after specs await, drop the connected emit if _remotePhase became 'disconnecting' (teardown authoritative). (2) added stale-'disconnecting' recovery to the !connected ladder, mirroring stale-'connecting'. Distinct from MPI-239 (server untracked-death self-heal). NOT live-verified — user to press Disconnect and watch footer flip to local immediately.
